| | | Hey there --

There is one thing I admire above all else about Kyrsten Sinema: her tenacity.

Kyrsten refuses to give up, even when the pressure is mounting and there's no apparent or easy solution.

Whether working across the aisle to make health care more affordable, standing up for Arizona veterans, or finding common ground on immigration reform, Kyrsten is on the front line, fighting for our shared values.

subject: Do you want to win in November?

body:

---
Peter,
Do you want to win in November and make sure a real conservative is representing Mississippi?
If we want to make it clear to the establishment that Mississippi is ready for true conservative leadership, we need your help.
Our biggest FEC deadline for the campaign to date, is on June 30th. That means everything we raised will be available for Democrats and the establishment to see.
We need to **raise $50,000 by June 30** , so the establishment will hear loud and clear that we are ready to toss them out of Washington and put real conservatives in their place.
**Let’s show them that their time is up.** [Chip in right now and send a strong message to Washington that Mississippi isn’t going to put up with them any longer.](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bjduue-ydllhlurty-y/)
Every dollar we raise represents another patriot standing up to fight what we see in Washington.
The establishment would rather have a puppet they can control than a real conservative fighting for Mississippi -- that’s why they want to silence us. Don’t let that happen.
[Please chip in today and help drain the Swamp for good.](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bjduue-ydllhlurty-j/)
Thank you,
Chris

Let’s show them that Mississippi is tired of them trying to control our lives. name: The White House
subject: #ChangeTheLaws
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc1772028495c86ee8fa1aa1fb42d0affd45fe900c0d348d82d3cb93d1e5ba6904ddd906d3f5ffcf4939c4c1cdb5e4c1c505a) The White House • June 20, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will meet with mining and steel workers in Duluth, Minnesota, to discuss how his Administration is protecting American workers. [Watch live at 6:05 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc1778b62fb7213db8e4305e255b36ea4a582d6ae0f1872f8903220fc6ec5a3153253010a4ab6eccf8abac38b4ee47dc7442c) |
---
|

## The President's call for action: #ChangeTheLaws
**President Trump addressed the immigration crisis** on America's southern border during a speech before the National Federation of Independent Businesses yesterday. "It's been going on for many, many decades and many years. And it has its ups and its downs," the President said. "And all we need is good legislation, and we can have it taken care of."
**Speaking in New York, Vice President Mike Pence** backed up the President's call for action. "As the President said today, we want to solve this problem. We don't want children taken away from their parents." The Vice President also stressed how the current system is a humanitarian disaster. "It is tragic that these failed immigration policies have created this incentive for vulnerable families and literally put vulnerable adults and children in danger. This is simply unacceptable."
**In an editorial yesterday,_National Review_** explained what must happen next. "Most critics don't grapple with the fact that the administration literally doesn't have the option of holding parents and kids together for more than a few weeks," the editors write. "Congress has it within its power to make it possible to hold families together and -- if they don't have legitimate asylum claims -- swiftly return them home together."
[See President Trump's speech to the Federation of Independent Businesses.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc177b6a00e94ea395f93d81a828edb3c1c79fe2d8a066d1dbdbc046cbdb0fddf06d08b41ded877840b54f207463e8bdd85cc)
**More** : ["Congress should act on the border," _National Review_ says](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc177f7bce095b46399315acddc07fad2435eb323c01f91396954ee24fdbdcb80a94592894427c4aedfa16872bc53413c3857)

---
|

## U.S. leaves a 'hypocritical and self-serving organization'
**U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley** joined Secretary of State Mike Pompeo yesterday to announce America's withdrawal from the UN Human Rights Council. "For too long, the Human Rights Council has been a protector of human rights abusers," Ambassador Haley said.
**"This step is not a retreat** from our human rights commitments," she added. "We take this step because our commitment does not allow us to remain a part of a hypocritical and self-serving organization that makes a mockery of human rights." Secretary Pompeo said the Council undermines America's national interest, as well as that of our allies.
[Watch the announcement from Ambassador Haley and Secretary Pompeo.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc177f50ae4e91e12687b8cdec33c3f0bbeccaf5e4655c5599ea559ad0f8976bd0a6930f3efce4a2052acfd97179a04dd9f93)

---
|

## Getting tough on Chinese trade: 'It's time'
**This week, President Trump made it clear** that America won't roll back its response to China's unfair trade practices. "Rather than altering those practices, [China] is now threatening United States companies, workers, and farmers who have done nothing wrong," the President said in a statement. "This is unacceptable. Further action must be taken."
**President Trump directed the U.S. Trade Representative** to identify $200 billion worth of Chinese goods for additional tariffs. After the legal process is complete, these tariffs will go into effect if China refuses to change its practices. "We have no choice. This should have been done many years ago," the President said yesterday. "They've taken so much. It's time, folks. It's time."
[Read President Trump's full statement on trade with China.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc1771d748958b8bf222e228739a6207f2c25dd308f12a2d6a8c0d40f5d17c8778ce5219a3fb3079d652b42ab5c16def33207)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Trump and the First Lady welcome King Felipe VI and Queen Letizia of Spain to the White House** | June 19, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc177466a070be62d1ac779b148d03f6ca0c10c9aeae4ad141b7a0fd60c50886525c6676b3c9ace563fbd62003b0858af315e) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=3f9560f91a2fc17716892382959734b0a8d283f41773c73bbb5f56883e48f3bbe54ebac5a81b843b5147f2f54d2c6048e13c046d37534661) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d43e7f0d50ed9b32e20f3b7f45500f6aa35cafabd2e70484198eed882a44b3b9f3e5149021bd5106531d970d95341d7ea38d70a7f2541a29ad)
---

name: Paul Davis
subject: Washington must fix this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0Eb5HCsx3-eVJmbcj-5El_TUxGE9zjgMXp5IVNKZxGA=/YxV-6t9u4gw7JtAJ6DlTX4g2Xir4xUgRaKRmy0CD97A=)
Dear Peter,
Like so many Kansans, I've watched in horror as reports of young children, senselessly ripped from their parents at the border, seeped into our national consciousness over the last few days. I cringed when I heard audio of a little girl wailing for her 'mama' in the background at a detention center. And I agree with former First Lady Laura Bush: images of terrified toddlers, surrounded by immigration enforcement officials, are nothing short of heartbreaking.

Then I looked to Washington, and I became angry. All I see is finger pointing, excuses, and scrambling to do damage control in response to a crisis they had every opportunity to prevent.

Illegal immigration is a serious problem that has created fear and unrest everywhere - including Kansas. Everyone agrees that our current system is broken, myself included. And Congress has always had the power to fix it -- they just _chose_ not to. As years of inaction and political gamesmanship now come to a head, children are once again left hanging in the balance. Eventually the media will move on to the next news cycle, but the trauma these children have endured in recent weeks will haunt them forever.

It's time for Washington to live up to the American ideals it was built to represent. They must work together to fix our immigration system once and for all. If they do not, we should elect new leaders in November who will.

Paul

name: Xochitl Hinojosa
subject: I grew up on the border, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
The horror happening in my hometown right now is a sharp contrast to the community I grew up in.
---
I was born and raised in Brownsville, Texas -- the town where children are currently being held after they were torn away from their parents at a federal detention facility.

The horror happening in my hometown right now is a sharp contrast to the community I grew up in. I lived five blocks from the border and regularly went back and forth between Brownsville and Matamoros, a border town in Mexico. I'd go to visit friends and my peers who went to school with me.

Before Donald Trump, that was the norm in our community -- it's what made it so great. But now, because of this president's cruelty, he is only causing fear in the town I grew up in and attacking those I love the most.

**Separating children from their parents at the border is against every American value that I've ever been taught.**

Trump has made repeated attacks on those values -- but quite frankly, it only mobilizes us to fight back. Today is one of those days we need to fight back, Derek.

**Senate Democrats have introduced the Keep Families Together Act -- legislation that would end the inhumane practice of separating families at the border. Add your name to tell the Senate to pass this bill immediately.**

[ I'M IN](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521358/4067b0a/6496ffc66/7fbdf15c/3608598887/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/keep-families-together-act?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20180620_xh_s2&source=em_20180620_xh_s2&refcode=em_20180620_xh_s2")
This crisis has been manufactured by the Trump administration. Tearing children from their parents is a choice made by Trump, and he has the ability to stop it.

No matter what Trump and his allies may claim, this is not standard practice. My mother came to the U.S. from Mexico in the 1950s at the age of two. She was undocumented -- yet she wasn't separated from her parents when she got here.

Thousands of children have already been ripped away from their parents at the Trump administration's direction. Right now it is on every single one of us to stop this inhumane policy and reunite these children with their families.

**[Tell the Senate to pass the Keep Families Together Act -- legislation that will stop the Trump administration from separating families at the border.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521358/4067b0a/6496ffc66/7fbdf15d/3608598887/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/keep-families-together-act?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Tell+the+Senate+to+pass+the+Keep+Familie&utm_campaign=em_20180620_xh_s2&source=em_20180620_xh_s2&refcode=em_20180620_xh_s2")**

Thanks for taking a stand today.

Xochitl

Xochitl Hinojosa
Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. Donald Trump, his administration, and his party have called people like me and my neighbors "rapists" and "criminals." He's said we're in gangs, and he's tried to make people afraid of us. He's tried to divide us and pit us against each other. Don't let him get away with it -- **[add your name right now to stand against Trump's divisive policies and demand the Senate pass the Keep Families Together Act.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521358/4067b0a/6496ffc66/7fbdf15a/3608598887/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/keep-families-together-act?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+add+your+name+right+now+to+stand+against&utm_campaign=em_20180620_xh_s2&source=em_20180620_xh_s2&refcode=em_20180620_xh_s2")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521358/4067b0a/6496ffc66/7fbdf15b/3608598887/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180620_xh_s2&source=em_20180620_xh_s2&refcode=em_20180620_xh_s2").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521358/4067b0a/6496ffc66/7fbdf158/3608598887/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180620_xh_s2&refcode=em_20180620_xh_s2").

clean_body: The horror happening in my hometown right now is a sharp contrast to the community I grew up in. I was born and raised in Brownsville, Texas -- the town where children are currently being held after they were torn away from their parents at a federal detention facility. The horror happening in my hometown right now is a sharp contrast to the community I grew up in. I lived five blocks from the border and regularly went back and forth between Brownsville and Matamoros, a border town in Mexico. I'd go to visit friends and my peers who went to school with me. Before Donald Trump, that was the norm in our community -- it's what made it so great. But now, because of this president's cruelty, he is only causing fear in the town I grew up in and attacking those I love the most. Separating children from their parents at the border is against every American value that I've ever been taught. Trump has made repeated attacks on those values -- but quite frankly, it only mobilizes us to fight back. Today is one of those days we need to fight back, Derek. Senate Democrats have introduced the Keep Families Together Act -- legislation that would end the inhumane practice of separating families at the border. Add your name to tell the Senate to pass this bill immediately. "" This crisis has been manufactured by the Trump administration. Tearing children from their parents is a choice made by Trump, and he has the ability to stop it. No matter what Trump and his allies may claim, this is not standard practice. My mother came to the U.S. from Mexico in the 1950s at the age of two. She was undocumented -- yet she wasn't separated from her parents when she got here. Thousands of children have already been ripped away from their parents at the Trump administration's direction. Right now it is on every single one of us to stop this inhumane policy and reunite these children with their families. "" Thanks for taking a stand today. Xochitl Xochitl Hinojosa Communications Director Democratic National Committee P.S. Donald Trump, his administration, and his party have called people like me and my neighbors "rapists" and "criminals." He's said we're in gangs, and he's tried to make people afraid of us. He's tried to divide us and pit us against each other. Don't let him get away with it -- ""

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: un-American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CJn5edrasOGVKWaMLepEphA5gonycWYdNHxEMsp9GW4=/GQfrq_i5b_Pq96UzqvMhYUSi-ObahiF6wCGlY1q6cy0=)

Peter,

2,300. As of this writing, that's how many children the Trump administration has taken from their parents over the past 2 months. Many of them have been shipped off as far as Michigan or Long Island. Their parents are unable to locate them or speak to them. It's a harmful and harrowing experience.

You might have seen the photos of children waiting in cages and heard the audio of babies crying out for their mothers. I will not sit by and allow this to continue.

[**That 's why I need you to add your name to this petition. We need as many voices as we can get to rise up and condemn these horrible and un-American actions as soon as possible. Add yours ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CJn5edrasOGVKWaMLepEphA5gonycWYdNHxEMsp9GW4=/N8aQG5wb7becYjGmo7Zr-56jCUX9w7pfr5KIStnEBHY=?code=DanLipinski&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdl-family-separations-ja-up%3Frefcode%3DLipinskiJA%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue)

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/CJn5edrasOGVKWaMLepEphA5gonycWYdNHxEMsp9GW4=/N8aQG5wb7becYjGmo7Zr-56jCUX9w7pfr5KIStnEBHY=?code=DanLipinski&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdl-family-separations-ja-up%3Frefcode%3DLipinskiJA%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue)
Regardless of which side of the aisle you sit on, I am sure you find this to be immoral and unacceptable. Children are not political bargaining chips. It's time for my Republican colleagues to stand up to Trump and end this inhumane policy immediately.

America has long been a country of hope for those looking to better their lives and the lives of their children, and we cannot become a country that slams the door on those in need.

I will not watch as this administration demonizes migrant families and demeans young children, all for the sake of getting an upper hand. We cannot and will not negotiate with children's lives.

[**Peter -- tell the Trump administration that this is unacceptable.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CJn5edrasOGVKWaMLepEphA5gonycWYdNHxEMsp9GW4=/N8aQG5wb7becYjGmo7Zr-56jCUX9w7pfr5KIStnEBHY=?code=DanLipinski&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdl-family-separations-ja-up%3Frefcode%3DLipinskiJA%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue)

Thanks.

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress

[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e662f/51dbcc2a/5ba5f7c/3a5c67b/587156300/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

Hi there,

When I was elected to the Senate in 2016, it was because grassroots supporters just like you committed their time, energy and resources to make it happen. I'll be forever grateful for that.

Now my friend Bob is up for re-election, and I know how much that same support means to him. It has allowed him to hire staff, put ads on the air and start to build an organizing program that will turn out the vote in November. Now Bob wants to say thank you to his supporters, and I'm happy to help him do it.

[**_I'm coming to Philadelphia next month, and Bob's campaign will fly one lucky winner and a guest out to join us -- just chip in $5 or whatever you can to be automatically entered to win._**](https://secure.bobcasey. It's so important to give Bob our full support this year, team. He's been a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda, standing up for middle-class families, affordable health care and our democracy itself. name: Austin Petersen
subject: I’ve got a big report due
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend, Please forgive me for the length of this email. I’ve got a lot to tell you about. We are less than two months from the Missouri GOP primary and there is a lot we have left to do. On June 30th, I will submit the very last FEC campaign finance report before the August primary. It is the very last report that the media, my supporters, voters, and even the establishment will see before the election. I can’t begin to tell you how important it is that I submit a report that demonstrates I have thousands of online supporters and a war chest to take down Josh Hawley. Which is why I am sending you this email, Friend. I know that you are a big supporter, but it looks like you haven’t made an online donation yet. I made a promise to myself when I announced my candidacy that I would do everything I can to win this race and honor my supporters’ contributions. I fully realize your donation represents hard earned money that may not be easy to part with. I can tell you that every dollar given to our campaign is used to advance the cause of liberty and achieve victory. I would like to ask for support before this deadline. Friend, will you make your first online contribute to the campaign today? [**Please click here to chip in the most generous contribution you can make to the campaign. A donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $75, $50, $25, $10, or even $5 will help propel us to victory >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062018_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062018_nondonor&n=1) On a personal note, I can tell you that I am confident and optimistic about our chances. There’s a lot of pressure and the campaign hours are getting long. I am giving everything I have to this campaign. I am overwhelmed by the amount of support I’ve received so far. Witnessing the growth of the liberty movement has been such an amazing experience. Friend, this is the most important deadline I have faced on the campaign. It would mean so much to me if you sent a donation today. [**Please make a donation by clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062018_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062018_nondonor&n=2) Thank you so much. Austin

name: Mel Hall
subject: My heart breaks for these families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress |
body:
Friend,

I want to take a moment to share my thoughts with you on the family separation crisis.

We must protect our borders, enforce existing laws, and fix our broken immigration system. But we can do so without tearing families apart. The recent reports from our southern border are distressing and concerning to me as a father, minister, and candidate for Congress.

As a father, my heart breaks for these families. I can’t imagine the terror of mothers and fathers as their children are helplessly removed from their care. It pains me to think about the children, some merely months old, oblivious to the political environment they find themselves in. The screams and cries of these children, many of whom are unable to speak for themselves, breaks my heart.

As a minister and man of faith, I believe that we must treat the strangers among us as we want to be treated. We are a welcoming nation, founded by immigrants on the promise of a hopeful tomorrow. I am sickened to see those in power deliberately using Scripture to tear families apart. That’s not what we are called to do – and it is certainly not who we are as Americans.

As a candidate, this crisis motivates me to serve. Too often children and the most vulnerable among us are used as bargaining chips. There is a reasonable path forward and I urge Congress and the Administration to come to their senses and do what is morally right.

Mel

-------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress |
-------------------------------------------

Mel Hall for Congress
P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/MhjfBTpUka0Qa92dU9A8GzqZYwcHz85phE0rlVz_Nvo=/7nlymuhXARn1HAGHAhuWiK4vc8gQP3ohni-jbZq6Mno=.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm with Kyrsten
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | Hey there --

There is one thing I admire above all else about Kyrsten Sinema: her tenacity.

Kyrsten refuses to give up, even when the pressure is mounting and there's no apparent or easy solution.

Whether working across the aisle to make health care more affordable, standing up for Arizona veterans, or finding common ground on immigration reform, Kyrsten is on the front line, fighting for our shared values.

**_[That's why I'm proud to be standing with Kyrsten Sinema in her race for the Senate -- and I hope you are as well.](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-booker?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+proud+to+be+stand&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_NC1_180620_1_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_NC1_180620_1_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_NC1_180620_1_1_1")_**

**[DONATE $10](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-booker?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_NC1_180620_1_1_1&source=KS_EM_FR_NC1_180620_1_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_FR_NC1_180620_1_1_1")**
Friend, I'll be up front.

Defeat is not an option for us in Arizona.

There's no better candidate in this contest than Kyrsten.

With her experience in Congress, her extraordinary life story, and her deep commitment to Arizona values, Kyrsten is someone we need in the Senate.

Kyrsten represents a new generation of leaders who tackle the hard issues, challenge Washington politics-as-usual, and build coalitions to get things done for working Arizonans and American families.

**_[Will you join me in supporting Kyrsten? She's up against powerful opponents and needs our help today.](http://act.kyrstensinema. | | Peter -- **Vice President Mike Pence wants me out of the Senate.** He and the president are all-in for my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. Pence will say what he wants. Renacci will run all the attack ads he likes. And special interests will likely spend millions. And there's only one way I can fight back: **Your support.** With the help of this grassroots team, we can reach the hardworking Ohioans who will decide the outcome of this election. name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Happy 155th, WV!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Fellow Democrat,
Today we celebrate 155 years of West Virginia and now, we are in critical times to keep her future bright. Not only do we celebrate our state today, but we also pledge to keep fighting for all 55 counties of it.
We made a promise with the launch of our Fight for 55 campaign to keep fighting for all 55 counties of West Virginia families and [**we pledge today to keep going, will you join us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1450899/7875378/-969126113?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTI1OWQxYS1jMjc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5CjO34tpXrONRNNyGT4yAs7ffagyXiVcnaQMNAhhfjI=)
We're in this Fight for 55 together and although our state is in critical times, we cannot give up on her.
West Virginians are tough, resilient, and compassionate people and [we can't give up now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1450900/7875379/-969126113?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTI1OWQxYS1jMjc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5CjO34tpXrONRNNyGT4yAs7ffagyXiVcnaQMNAhhfjI=)\-- not on our fellow West Virginians and not on our home.
[Join us today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1450901/7875380/-969126113?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTI1OWQxYS1jMjc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5CjO34tpXrONRNNyGT4yAs7ffagyXiVcnaQMNAhhfjI=) and every day moving forward to elect leadership that will protect the people of West Virginia, not political interests and corporations.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Senator McCaskill is working overtime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
Senator McCaskill working to ensure that illegal immigrants continue pouring through our border by using their children as a human shield. Secure our border, protect our citizens, allow ordered immigration to those who wish to become productive members of American society. These are common sense principles.

So why is Senator McCaskill fighting to allow illegal immigrants to pour across our border by using children as human shields? **McCaskill is working overtime to pass Senator Dianne Feinstein’s bill that would allow any illegal immigrant who brings a child with them to escape into our country, no questions asked.**

Senator McCaskill doesn't want solutions that would allow families to stay together, _**just like she doesn’t want a solution that would secure the border.**_

While Missouri families are struggling to pay for their health insurance and keep up with rising costs, **Claire McCaskill is working to help illegal immigrants. That’s her priority.**

It’s wrong. It’s inexcusable. It’s dangerous. _And she should answer for it._ [ JOIN JOSH - DONATE TODAY ](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=821ec204b06b4e5887a6397125524826&_e=s6TmkLOE0YL7KpJPXjF48YrmiGwQfMKaXKbs9Ha2TgiSiPW5c4zpPnosVXOJNiMVBvF9k4qIEX8i5YoRrzZM8JIt0sR34Uzgbmu_vuvkiSzuO7NWcirsOj407tI-DQHQtB88jBtKWXsAWMSmnotbNRH_fcX_HfFGBIRmtI3ijpH2KB19mKJQnTqK2l8CL3Zey_nm32BIETrmh9iln59r7M0kQJd3BPNadxrXrzp25pwbZbYpey0WYQitJGBF86Rn1KfLz1wrTtWrJ7QLsliNF6J-RCQzYnrlND6bxS4urWAzfkk8kyV6r0P8JXYN6QyFSHqdlN7yZ379R72-ukgef7oKtrifzoodSnmgMd0SHr3PXfQaer4tJ_RLswrB0GWn) If you agree - [I need you to show your support by donating.](https://email.joshhawley.co/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=821ec204b06b4e5887a6397125524826&_e=s6TmkLOE0YL7KpJPXjF48YrmiGwQfMKaXKbs9Ha2TgiSiPW5c4zpPnosVXOJNiMVBvF9k4qIEX8i5YoRrzZM8JIt0sR34Uzgbmu_vuvkiSzuO7NWcirsOj407tI-DQHQtB88jBtKWXsAWMSmnotbNRH_fcX_HfFGBIRmtI3ijpHKCjsfCr4QUjBeIGld2j14iBZxS6vO2nXvjbTe4MknBvYYMc8_Z1YxevjxWV6aK7SAR1FNvMrdJBkEP0G_8ROD1CeCQU57QvfCnceYhQ81O6mccVIhYdzv_urrEEDbdKmunlPGLXb2noyTQNLdyfzQ0hiMnbOtsqfOs7TNkV_d0oLQVZLituuEWaUluQorXIqCZcjJGycyQsvmSLzMNh99) This race could come down to only a few hundred votes - we need every resource available to win.

name: Senate Update (2)
subject: Ted Cruz, Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump (oh my!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Republicans are worried, friends. They know Democrats can take back the Senate if Jacky Rosen wins in Nevada this November - so they're doing **EVERYTHING** they can to buy this seat:
[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd767/4fbb2af3/7f0c9016/5e8b8cc2/3604856847/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azYwMS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk601-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
That's why everyone - from Ted Cruz to Donald Trump to Mitch McConnell - is going **ALL IN** to help Dean Heller win in Nevada: so they can keep the Senate red. **In fact, President Trump is coming to fundraise for Senator Heller in Nevada THIS WEEKEND.**

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Indescribably immoral
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3039/9e00690/46a21839/2402298b/846009157/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&source=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx")
Friends,

Like a lot of families, this past weekend I had the privilege to spend Father's Day with my children. We spent the day enjoying time together and, at the end of the night, I got to tuck my three beautiful children into bed.

But not every family was so fortunate -- which is why on Saturday I'm canceling my other campaign events and will be marching in solidarity with our brothers and sisters at the Homestead detention facility in South Florida.

Thanks to the Trump administration's indescribably immoral and inhumane detention policy, thousands of children have been separated from their parents on our southern border -- and our Republicans "leaders" are doing nothing about it.

I demand that Governor Rick Scott -- who is now asking for our vote to be our next Senator -- stand up to the Trump Administration and support the Keeping Families Together Act. **[Add your name next to mine now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3039/9e00690/46a21839/2402298a/846009157/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/support-the-keeping-families-together-act?gpsid=8_55_1388&source=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+next+to+mine+now")**

When asked, Governor Scott didn't have much to say on this crisis, but in times of moral crisis we need our leaders to step forward. History is watching, friend.

This is what our country has been in the past, and it doesn't have to be our future. Our country can be better than this -- but only if we make our elected officials demand the reconciliation and reunification of families in one, united voice.

**[Add your name now and stand with me in calling on Governor Scott support the Keeping Families Together Act.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3039/9e00690/46a21839/2402298d/846009157/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/support-the-keeping-families-together-act?gpsid=8_55_1388&source=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+now+and+stand+with+me+in+c")**

Thank you,

Andrew

[Add your name](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3039/9e00690/46a21839/2402298c/846009157/VEsC/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/support-the-keeping-families-together-act?gpsid=8_55_1388&source=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3039/9e00690/46a21839/2402298f/846009157/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3039/9e00690/46a21839/2402298e/846009157/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&source=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3039/9e00690/46a21839/24022981/846009157/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx&source=em18_180619_immigr_adv_gq_ful__AG_ettx")

body:
|
---
| Did you see this? Rick Scott has spent $17 million (that's not a typo) on advertising, and he's just getting started. Scott and Trump are laser-focused on defeating Bill Nelson.

[**We need grassroots support to repel their attacks. Will you help? Tomorrow we 're putting every penny we can toward on-the-ground organizing to rebuff their attacks. Get your contribution in before the deadline here ->**](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-counter-scott-ads-now?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+We+need+grassroots+support+to+repel+thei&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180620_1_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180620_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180620_1_2")

**_Begin forwarded message:_** **Rick Scott 's ad spending hits $17 million**
**Alert: Democrats are organizing to fight back**
**[Chip in $5 within the next 48 hours so we can counter Scott's ads NOW ->](http://act.floridadems. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fdp-counter-scott-ads-now?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+ask+within+the+next+48+hours+so+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180620_1_2&source=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180620_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_FR_180DO_180620_1_2")** Team -- Rick Scott is using the exact same strategy as always: overwhelm his Democratic opponent with millions and millions of dollars, much of which is out of his own pocket.

So far he's spent over $17 million on attack ads. That's unbelievable. We need your help to fight back.

**We know that organizing on the ground and talking to voters face to face can drown out Scott 's ads, but we need to massively expand our grassroots programs in order to do so.**

Friend,

You and a friend of your choice have the chance to be flown out to meet President Trump for breakfast in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. _**We 'll even put you up at a hotel and ensure you remember this breakfast with your own photo with the President.**_

Because you have been such a loyal supporter of the President, we're offering you the chance to get TWO ENTRIES.

Team TRUMP

name: Mary Barzee Flores
subject: Families Belong Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TZXphpvmGZ-YQb2Xfv_vZO9bKMHH4QZfky_bOuxqUG8=/ARrjJlIvQgLWJHRUktMf9TCaaIWk4dKoHyFWbB-V7mY=?code=BarzeeFlores) Sitting down to write this, I'm almost at a loss for words. I cannot believe how far things have gone in this draconian administration. The current Trump administration policy of separating children and infants from their family at the border is unconscionable. The cruelty and inhumanity of such a measure defies human capacity of understanding. We all must do something. We cannot let this happen in our country and remain silent. That's why I've put together a petition, calling on Rep. Diaz-Balart and our other Republican members of Congress to step up and end this barbaric policy. [Add your name to tell Mario Diaz-Balart and Congress: End your barbaric policy of separating families and detaining children in horrible conditions.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TZXphpvmGZ-YQb2Xfv_vZO9bKMHH4QZfky_bOuxqUG8=/ARrjJlIvQgLWJHRUktMf9TCaaIWk4dKoHyFWbB-V7mY=?code=BarzeeFlores) For those of us in southern Florida, this atrocity is close to home too. It was revealed yesterday that Miami-Dade County is home to a secret, jail-like facility that houses untold numbers of migrant children. Diaz-Balart's inaction in the face of this sort of abject immorality is nothing short of cowardice. We can debate differences in public policy, or the role of government in our lives, but there is no room for debate when it comes to our children's well-being. The United States has always been a beacon of hope for immigrants looking for a better life. We cannot become a country that slams the door on people in need. We must continue to speak out against Donald Trump's relentless attacks on immigrant families and fight back against an administration that heartlessly tears them apart. [SIGN NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/TZXphpvmGZ-YQb2Xfv_vZO9bKMHH4QZfky_bOuxqUG8=/ARrjJlIvQgLWJHRUktMf9TCaaIWk4dKoHyFWbB-V7mY=?code=BarzeeFlores) Thanks for your support.
Mary Barzee Flores PS. If you'd like to make a donation to the organizations that are at the border trying to stop this flagrant, state-sanctioned child abuse, donate [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/TZXphpvmGZ-YQb2Xfv_vZO9bKMHH4QZfky_bOuxqUG8=/IHwZRaAGGnxm35RSA7vlpWoxYiLsKW2825keEijt91c=). | Paid for by Mary Barzee Flores for Congress
---
Mary Barzee Flores for Congress c/o – Gloria Maggiolo
6619 S Dixie Hwy, #148
Miami FL 33143 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/TZXphpvmGZ-YQb2Xfv_vZO9bKMHH4QZfky_bOuxqUG8=/xeUorZ0fvra_FePvvlSFtvRo2UShkM4DdhfrINPDRv4=).

One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; two (2) admission tickets to Gala Dinner in LA featuring President Obama on Thursday, June 28, 2018; ground transportation to and from the airport at the Destination and ground transportation to and from the Barack Obama Gala Dinner in LA; Opportunity to meet and take photograph with Barack Obama. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052137d/4067b0a/657fdbf83/7fbdd357/642416749/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/content/2018-obama-contest/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20180620_dnc_nd&source=em_20180620_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180620_dnc_nd")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Call on the Trump administration to combat climate change >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc080/2a380d31/e0cf257/f1ae60/1385759383/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc080/2a380d31/e0cf257/f1ae60/1385759383/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there
This time last year, Donald Trump made a reckless decision to shirk his responsibility to address the stark dangers of climate change and pulled our country out of the Paris climate agreement.
The U.S. used to lead on climate change progress, but now we're the ONLY country in the world not committed to stopping climate change.
[**We 're speaking out, and we need your voice. Please sign our petition calling on the Trump administration to honor our responsibility to combat climate change.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc080/2a380d31/e0cf257/f1ae61/1385759383/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fparis-climate-agreement%3Frefcode%3De20180620_ParisAccordsJA_up%26recurring%3Dauto")
Trump's tenure in the White House has been disastrous for the environment. He has rolled back clean air and water regulations, and routinely refuses to accept simple science and facts.
It's not just today's families that will feel the effect of Trump's reckless climate decisions.
Future generations will inherit dirty drinking water, polluted air, and access to fewer natural resources.
This is urgent. We must do everything in our power to combat the threat of climate change.
[**Please add your name to recommit to the fight.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc080/2a380d31/e0cf257/f1ae61/1385759383/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/parisoneyear/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fparis-climate-agreement%3Frefcode%3De20180620_ParisAccordsJA_up%26recurring%3Dauto")
We thank you, and our country's kids, grandkids, and great grandkids thank you.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc080/2a380d31/e0cf257/f1ae62/1385759383/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGFyaXMtY2xpbWF0ZS1hZ3JlZW1lbnQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDYyMF9QYXJpc0FjY29yZHNKQV9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paris-climate-agreement?refcode=e20180620_ParisAccordsJA_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc080/2a380d31/e0cf257/f1ae63/1385759383/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Peter Joffrion for Congress
subject: Weekly Update - June 20
body:
**Garden Tour This Saturday!**
The Hidden Gardens Tour in Huntsville will take place this Saturday, June 23, from 10 AM to 2 PM. Enjoy seven private gardens in Huntsville’s historic neighborhoods. Tickets are $10 in advance and $15 on the day of the event. The separate reception will be held from 4 to 6 PM. For a $200 donation you can even enjoy a personal garden consultation with Master Gardener Harvey Cotten! Visit the [campaign website to get your tickets](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1452596/7883095/-1358150037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2FmMTAwMi1kNTc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evsEaFq26gRQQ-jVwjkT5m3SRFViw8iqsFmZYQQLU0k=) today.

**End of Q2 Fundraising**
The second quarter deadline for campaign fundraising is fast approaching. We’ll be reporting to the FEC on June 30th and want to give an account that shows how much support we really have to flip the 5th in November! Please consider [making a donation today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1452597/7883096/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2FmMTAwMi1kNTc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evsEaFq26gRQQ-jVwjkT5m3SRFViw8iqsFmZYQQLU0k=&emci=246eba7c-d374-e811-80c2-00155dc33681&emdi=17af1002-d574-e811-80c2-00155dc33681&ceid=6984379&am=&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=T4dI__0-dfEDePyorjCgspd37yJb0w5zE5HC9ix-vxo%3D) to help us reach our fundraising goal. Thank you!

**What a Day!**
Saturday was an incredibly busy day for Team Joffrion! Peter started the day at The Ivy Center Foundation White Linen Brunch with the Epsilon Gamma Omega Chapter of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority and then attended NASA in the Park, Rocket City Pride, and the Juneteenth celebration at Brahan Spring Park. Each event was special, and Peter enjoyed meeting everyone. The booth volunteers at Pride had an especially fun - if hot! – time making friends and petting dogs, and many new volunteers signed up to help the campaign.

**Volunteer of the Week**
Our volunteer of the week is Chris O’Neil, one of many young people working tirelessly to support the campaign. Chris spent a full day in the humidity and heat at Rocket City Pride, where his energy and enthusiasm never failed to bring people to our booth. Thank you, Chris!

**IT Volunteers Needed**
The campaign is looking for volunteers with experience in web development to help us update our website. Come by the Huntsville HQ at 303 Williams Ave. Suite 211 or contact Communications Director Jennifer Garlen at [jennifer@peterjoffrion.com](mailto:jennifer@peterjoffrion.com) if interested.

**Support Peter on Social Media!**
Our campaign has a strong presence on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1452598/7883097/433241428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2FmMTAwMi1kNTc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evsEaFq26gRQQ-jVwjkT5m3SRFViw8iqsFmZYQQLU0k=), [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1452599/7883098/307098554?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2FmMTAwMi1kNTc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evsEaFq26gRQQ-jVwjkT5m3SRFViw8iqsFmZYQQLU0k=&lang=en), and [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1452600/7883099/-1422524252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2FmMTAwMi1kNTc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evsEaFq26gRQQ-jVwjkT5m3SRFViw8iqsFmZYQQLU0k=). The easiest way to support Peter is to follow or like him on each platform that you use and then like, share, retweet, and reply to posts! You can spread the word about events, policy statements, fundraising, and more.

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/246eba7c-d374-e811-80c2-00155dc33681/17af1002-d574-e811-80c2-00155dc33681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2FmMTAwMi1kNTc0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM2ODEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evsEaFq26gRQQ-jVwjkT5m3SRFViw8iqsFmZYQQLU0k=&id=110339827&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: Ben Jealous
subject: You, me, and Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We can do this if we work together.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f45/3476660869/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0620A") Friend, Six days. That's all we have left -- so I phoned a friend to come help out. In a few hours, I'll be joined by Senator Kamala Harris to talk about why progressive values are winning values, especially right here at home. [**She believes, like I do, that the best support is grassroots support, and that we do the most when we do it together. That's why I'm asking you to join the last push as we head into the primary: With six days left, can you donate $6 right now?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f45/3476660869/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0620A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$6 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f44/3476660869/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?amount=6&refcode=OHQ0620A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$25 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f47/3476660869/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?amount=25&refcode=OHQ0620A&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$50 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f46/3476660869/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?amount=50&refcode=OHQ0620A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**$100 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f41/3476660869/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?amount=100&refcode=OHQ0620A&express_lane=true")
---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f40/3476660869/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?amount=250&refcode=OHQ0620A&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f43/3476660869/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0620A&express_lane=true")
---
Kamala and I both know the power of grassroots support -- it's how we won marriage equality in Maryland and California, and eventually across the country.
We can't forget that June is Pride Month, and on both coasts, we were committed to ensuring equal rights for all couples who love each other. And the commitment to that -- buoyed by hard work and grassroots support from activists and citizens alike who care about making their communities, and their country, better for everybody -- got us equal marriage in every single state across the country.
That's the spirit of what we're building here in Maryland. We can get it done, but it takes hard work, and it takes working together. That's how change happens, and we know if we want the kind of progress we deserve -- like better public schools, more affordable, quality healthcare, and stronger, thriving communities -- we have to work hard, together.
$6 might not seem like a lot, just like one voice might not seem like a lot alone -- but together, that support makes all the difference. And it shows that this campaign is owned by you. Not corporations, not shadowy big-time donors -- you.
[**So own a piece of this progress -- with six days left, donate $6 now to fund the fight for a better Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f45/3476660869/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0620A")
Thanks,
Ben

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a666/7ab0e2c4/7f972c9b/349b9f45/3476660869/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-home-stretch?refcode=OHQ0620A")
---

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I recalled our troops from the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Separating children from their parents at the border is wrong, period.
|

Hello,

Separating children from their parents at the border is wrong, period.

The recent policy enacted by the Trump administration is cruel and goes against what our country stands for.

Yesterday, as a result of this policy, I recalled our North Carolina National Guard troops from the border. A policy this wrong demands a strong response.

**[Now I want you to get involved. I'm calling on the Trump administration to end this policy immediately. Add your name if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a0f/2fde7c66/469ef9e3/1568368e/2244030452/VEsE/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-border?gpsid=8_43_1399&source=em18_180620_border_adv_gq_nopn__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180620_border_adv_gq_nopn__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=2+-+Now+I+want+you+to+get+involved+Im+callin")**

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a0f/2fde7c66/469ef9e3/15683681/2244030452/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-border?gpsid=8_43_1399&source=em18_180620_border_adv_gq_nopn__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180620_border_adv_gq_nopn__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+rarr")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Bailing out coal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Add your name: Demand Trump drop his coal plan.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c60/2f5ea88d/7053bc13/2cbce93c/3084900849/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&utm_campaign=coal-resend&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I couldn't be more disgusted or disappointed by Donald Trump's absurd plan to intervene in our nation's energy production and prop up failing fossil fuels. The president is instructing the Department of Energy to foist a plan on utility companies that will force them to use massive amounts of coal in their energy production, whether they want to or not. It's a gross overreach by Donald Trump and senior administration officials. It's short-sighted -- and it's bad policy for our economy and our climate. [**Friend, this is as bad as it gets. Donald Trump's coal plan must be stopped. Trump's anti-science agenda must be stopped. Add your name here if you agree.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c60/2f5ea88d/7053bc13/2cbce93c/3084900849/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&utm_campaign=coal-resend&utm_medium=ema") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c60/2f5ea88d/7053bc13/2cbce93c/3084900849/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&utm_campaign=coal-resend&utm_medium=ema") Even massive utility companies oppose Donald Trump's crazy plan mandating they use coal in their energy production. It will cost consumers more, while devastating our economy and climate. Why shouldn't utility companies be allowed to use cleaner, cheaper forms of energy? Because for our president, politics trumps logic. This is the most destructive example yet of Donald Trump's ignorant agenda to rollback environmental protections while cozying up to the fossil-fuel industry. [**We have to stop him. Sign on to oppose Trump's coal plan today.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c60/2f5ea88d/7053bc13/2cbce93c/3084900849/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&utm_campaign=coal-resend&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78c60/2f5ea88d/7053bc13/2cbce93c/3084900849/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&source=ema_2018-06-20_coal-resend&utm_campaign=coal-resend&utm_medium=ema")
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Absolutely appalled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
I don't care who you are or what party you vote for -- this situation is abhorrent. It's against what this country stands for. And it must end. | |
---
**_Tell the Trump administration to STOP SEPARATING FAMILIES!_** [ADD YOUR NAME >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d29/3592302423/VEsH/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/stop_separating_families/?code=RepTimRyan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fprotectimmigrantfamilies%3Frefcode%3Dtimryan_em20180620_30") Folks, In the last few days, my office has been inundated with emails, calls, and letters from Republicans, Democrats, and independents alike. Like them, and like you, I'm absolutely appalled by the situation at the border. I'm angry and ashamed that the President of the United States is using his power to tear families apart, and that he has openly referred to suffering children as political bargaining chips. **I don't care who you are or what party you vote for -- this situation is abhorrent. It's against what this country stands for. And it must end.** [I've joined a broad coalition of elected officials, candidates, and organizations calling for an IMMEDIATE end to the cruel policy of separating families at the border. Join us by adding your name today:](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d28/3592302423/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stop_separating_families/?code=RepTimRyan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fprotectimmigrantfamilies%3Frefcode%3Dtimryan_em20180620_30") [ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d28/3592302423/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/stop_separating_families/?code=RepTimRyan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fprotectimmigrantfamilies%3Frefcode%3Dtimryan_em20180620_30") The President has presented a false choice: That we care for these families OR secure our border. The Americans I know -- and the folks calling my office every day -- don't think that way. We all care about keeping our country safe. But we also care about fixing our broken immigration system and ensuring that the United States remains a beacon of hope to all those fleeing persecution and violence. **And we are all horrified at the sight of inhumane detention center conditions, sobbing parents being dragged away from their kids...and children _literally_ locked in cages. This is NOT who we are.** I have signed on as a co-sponsor of **H.R. 6135, the Keep Families Together Act** , which would end the Administration's inhumane family-separation policy. I will be in touch in the coming days about how all of us can put pressure on our elected officials to turn this policy into law. [Until then, please add your name to call for an IMMEDIATE end to the Trump Administration's cruel policy of separating families.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d29/3592302423/VEsC/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/stop_separating_families/?code=RepTimRyan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fprotectimmigrantfamilies%3Frefcode%3Dtimryan_em20180620_30") Thank you, \-- Tim P.S. After you sign, you'll land on a donation page where you can support six different organizations working on the crisis at the border: **The Asylum Seeker Border Project, Kids in Need of Defense (KIND), Texas Civil Rights Project, Women's Refugee Commission, We Belong Together, and La Union Del Pueblo Entero.** [Click here to learn more about those organizations and give directly.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2b/3592302423/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectimmigrantfamilies?refcode=timryan_em20180620_30")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2a/3592302423/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2d/3592302423/VEsB/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2c/3592302423/VEsO/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2f/3592302423/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2e/3592302423/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2a/3592302423/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92ec/5486deaa/281edf1c/dcc7d2d/3592302423/VEsHBw/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I'm a breast cancer survivor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I am a breast cancer survivor. I am an American living with a pre-existing condition. **The Trump Administration just announced that it will not defend protections for me, or the 130 million Americans living with a pre-existing condition, from discrimination at the hands of insurance companies.** This is part of Republicans' ongoing mission to destroy the Affordable Care Act, bit by little bit. We can't let them get away with it. [**_Demand President Trump and his administration reverse this decision and defend Americans with pre-existing conditions._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f36/622b7b5b/1b479edb/307b8015/3847260599/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180620z") No cancer patient should worry they'll be denied the health coverage they need to afford treatment. The health of millions of Americans is on the line. I will not be silent. I am fighting back. And I hope you'll join me. The Affordable Care Act needs some fixes, to be sure. **But eliminating protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions is not one of them.** [**_Let the Trump Administration know where you stand >>_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f36/622b7b5b/1b479edb/307b8015/3847260599/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180620z") Thank you. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lindsay_Coleman_=28Team_O=E2=80=99Halleran=29?=
subject: join us this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Friends,

We're excited to announce an exciting event next Saturday in Phoenix, but it won't be complete without you there!

Join Team O'Halleran, along with Rep. Ruben Gallego and Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus, Rep. Linda Sanchez for a brunch and discussion on voter engagement in the 2018 elections! Guests are encouraged to contribute any any level of support. Contributions will benefit the O'Halleran Victory Fund, and will be used in partnership with the Arizona Democratic Party to turn out voters in November.

To contribute and RSVP automatically>>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180623ovf

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Lindsay Coleman

Please join us for brunch
and a discussion on voter engagement with
Rep. Tom O'Halleran (AZ-01)

Featuring Special Guests
Rep. Linda Sánchez (CA-38)
Rep. Ruben Gallego (AZ-07)

Saturday, June 23rd
10:00-11:30AM
The University Club of Phoenix
39 E Monte Vista Rd
Phoenix, AZ 85004
Host Levels (contribute or raise):
Host $1000 - Sponsor $500 - Friend $250 - Guest $100

Guests are encouraged to contribute any amount they are able to give.

Contributions will support Latino and Tribal turnout in November!
Contributions will benefit the O'Halleran Victory Fund.

To contribute online, and RSVP automatically, please visit:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/180623ovf

Please make checks payable to "O'Halleran Victory Fund" and mail to:
O'Halleran Victory Fund
2910 E Gary Way
Phoenix, AZ 85042

For more information, to RSVP, or to join the host committee, please contact
Charlie Burgin at charlie@tomohalleran.com or (480)227-0333
Contributions or gifts to O'Halleran Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to O'Halleran Victory Fund will by allocated as follows: The first $2,700 of a contribution from a person and the first $5,000 of a contribution from a multi-candidate PAC will be allocated to Tom O'Halleran for Congress for the 2018 Primary Election, the net $2,700 of a contribution from a person and the next $5,000 of a contribution from a multi-candidate PAC will be allocated to Tom O'Halleran for Congress for the 2018 General Election and any remaining funds up to $10,000 per calendar year from a person or a $5,000 from a multi-candidate PAC will be allocated to Arizona Democratic Party. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

For more information, to RSVP, or to join the host committee,
please contact Charlie Burgin by June 27
charlie@tomohalleran.com or (480) 227-0333

Checks can be mailed to:
Tom O'Halleran for Congress, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

Can't make it? That's okay -- you can help make the event a success by clicking below:
http://action.tomohalleran.com/regrets

Contributions and gifts to Tom O'Halleran for Congress are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Federal election law limits contributions to $2,700 per person per election (primary and general). Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals lacking "green cards," labor organizations & federal government contractors are prohibited. Printed

This message was emailed to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe from this email list, please paste this URL into your browser:
http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

body:
Team - Senator Heller promised to vote against a plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act because it would hurt Nevada, only to reverse his position after threats from Donald Trump. **Now, Trump is coming to town to pay Senator Heller back for his health care flip-flop - by throwing him an exclusive fundraiser!**
[**We 've set a goal to get 1,000 new donations in the door by their fundraiser on Saturday to fight back, but right now we still need 673 more. Can you step up with a contribution of $5 or whatever you can?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd779/4fbb2af3/7f19c87e/5e8b8eb5/1911490971/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc5MS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk791-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
You're reading this right: as a reward for throwing health care for hundreds of thousands of Nevadans under the bus, Dean Heller gets a ritzy fundraiser, where tickets are going for as much as $50,000 per couple. _The fundraiser is coming exactly one year to the day after Heller lied to Nevadans about protecting their health care._

Dean Heller relies on the support of his mega-rich donors and President Trump, but we have the support of people like you . And we need you in this moment, **or their MASSIVE fundraising haul this weekend could put our campaign in jeopardy.**
[**Give what you can right away to help us reach our donation goal, repeal and replace Dean Heller, and take back the Senate for Democrats.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd779/4fbb2af3/7f19c87e/5e8b8eb5/1911490971/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc5MS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk791-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Governor Roy Cooper
subject: My friend, Kathy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I want to take a moment to tell you about my friend, Kathy. As a mom, business owner, and nonprofit leader, Kathy has worked tirelessly to make North Carolina a better place to live, work, and raise a family. From helping people get back on their feet after the Great Recession to expanding early childhood education, Kathy has been a trusted and tireless advocate for North Carolina families for the last 30 years. When I think about the type of representation our state needs in Congress, I think about leaders like Kathy. She is someone we can trust to fight for affordable, accessible health care for working families. She is someone we can trust to fight for strong, quality public schools and expand access to vocational and job training programs so our kids are prepared for the jobs of today and tomorrow. She is someone we can trust to build an economy that works for all North Carolinians, not just those at the top. **I 'm proud to support Kathy and I hope you'll join me, today.** [**_Kathy is coming up on a big FEC goal this month. She's set a goal of $50,000 and needs our help to bring that money in. Please if you can -- contribute before time runs out. _**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427862/e3b7d3/5cbc1a97/2555ddfc/261091017/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180619?refcode=kme180619_m") I look forward to working with you to elect my friend and yours, Kathy Manning. Governor Roy Cooper
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427862/e3b7d3/5cbc1a97/2555dde3/261091017/VEsE/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427862/e3b7d3/5cbc1a97/2555dde2/261091017/VEsF/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")

From helping people get back on their feet after the Great Recession to expanding early childhood education, Kathy has been a trusted and tireless advocate for North Carolina families for the last 30 years. She is someone we can trust to fight for affordable, accessible health care for working families. She is someone we can trust to fight for strong, quality public schools and expand access to vocational and job training programs so our kids are prepared for the jobs of today and tomorrow. She is someone we can trust to build an economy that works for all North Carolinians, not just those at the top. I 'm proud to support Kathy and I hope you'll join me, today. "" I look forward to working with you to elect my friend and yours, Kathy Manning. Governor Roy Cooper | | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:

Let's make sure we send him a message. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0a3/c1f7015/6833de8e/1142c3b6/3765330102/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-trump?refcode=rtw_180620_em-full") **_POLITICO_ : Trump dreams the impossible: Winning Minnesota**
_" President Donald Trump, who finished fewer than 45,000 votes behind Hillary Clinton in Minnesota despite a threadbare effort that saw him visit the state only once, is intent on mining an urban-rural divide to capture the state in 2020."_ Donald Trump is visiting Minnesota tonight and is telling everyone he can turn it red for Republicans in 2018. **Send a message that progressives are fighting back and rush a contribution now:** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0a3/c1f7015/6833de8e/1142c3b6/3765330102/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-trump?refcode=rtw_180620_em-full")** Friends, We have no time to waste -- Trump is visiting Minnesota tonight, and we just got word that they had to move it to a larger venue because of demand for tickets. **Republicans in Minnesota are fired up -- and the only way to stop their momentum is for us to send a strong message right now that progressives are ready to fight back.[Rush a contribution of $5 right now. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b0a3/c1f7015/6833de8e/1142c3b6/3765330102/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-trump?refcode=rtw_180620_em-full")** Our public filing deadline is in just 10 days.
