name: Blue Pennsylvania
subject: BREAKING: Trump admin attacking Bob (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
_" The president and I count our friendship and our support with Lou Barletta as second to none."_
\-- Vice President Pence on Congressman Lou Barletta

**Help fight back:**
**_[Rush $5 or more to Senator Casey TODAY](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180620_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**
Breaking news, team: this afternoon, Vice President Pence went on local radio and announced his full-throated support for Congressman Lou Barletta, the Republican nominee who is challenging Bob this November.

This isn't the first person in the Trump administration to come out in support of Barletta: just before the primary, the president himself recorded a robocall on Barletta's behalf, attacking Bob Casey. Now Pence and Trump are wasting no time at all in coming after Bob together.

The GOP knows just how important Pennsylvania is this November. They want to keep their Senate majority, and Democrats have to defend ten seats. They are going to do all they can to come after the most vulnerable Democrats, including Bob.

**_[Stop the president and his allies from flipping Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat -- rush $5 or more to defend Bob today.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180620_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Pennsylvanians need a Senator like Bob who will stand up against this administration's disastrous, anti-middle-class agenda. They want someone who represents their best interests, some who won't blindly follow the president and party lines. Pence himself acknowledges that Barletta "will stand with the president" instead of ordinary Pennsylvanians -- that's not right.

**We need to send Bob back to the Senate so he can continue to stand as a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda. Can you rush $5 or more today?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180620_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180620_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180620_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180620_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180620_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Baseball is America's pastime, and who doesn't love getting out to local games in the summer? That's why I have a special contest for you.

**My team and I are raffling off two free tickets to join me in a box at the Albuquerque Isotopes game July 4th!**

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Tell McClintock to stop making excuses and pass comprehensive immigration reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/adUv3qYVZ41k1skbBDC4YzeDHVbdD1YcZnXe0agezkk=/_9_jRwZcOE6zUjAxDEGORhQdb4QrE9FKg_Jvo10apXE=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180417_JM_earthwk1_all_logo)
Peter,
I'm relieved that the administration heard our outcries and is ending its horrifying practice of separating migrant children--including infants and toddlers--from their parents.
But I am still appalled that Tom McClintock attempted to justify tearing children from their parents by blaming their families for "breaking the laws in the first place." It was nothing but a career-politician's attempt to distract voters from his decades of inaction on immigration rather than take real steps to solve our immigration challenge.
More children may not be torn from their parents tomorrow, but the root cause of the problem--a broken immigration system--has not been resolved. If I were representing the 4th District today, I would be working nonstop, across party lines, to find lasting, effective and thoughtful solutions to fix America's immigration system.
**If you agree that Tom McClintock and his allies must work toward comprehensive immigration reform now, stand with us --add your name to our petition now: **
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/adUv3qYVZ41k1skbBDC4YzeDHVbdD1YcZnXe0agezkk=/dP6RLnvQy2bg9Ykma7wCWhzxQlM-4tXyjZuMEcz4X4Y=?ms=email_20180620)
---

Small business leaders, law enforcement and faith leaders agree--our country is in desperate need of comprehensive immigration reform. Former first lady Laura Bush summarized this challenge clearly: "I appreciate the need to enforce and protect our international boundaries, but this zero-tolerance policy is cruel. It is immoral. And it breaks my heart."
McClintock not only refuses to take responsibility for his inaction on immigration--he advocates for an ineffective and costly policy that traumatizes and criminalizes children. Spending our precious resources heartlessly separating children from their parents at triple the cost per day does nothing to solve our immigration or security challenges.
Instead of focusing on the real challenges we face, McClintock is spending taxpayer dollars and law enforcement manpower locking up children.
Real leaders work toward real solutions to our community's real challenges. Let's end the games and the grandstanding--we have to get to work.
[_**Join me in telling McClintock we need comprehensive immigration reform now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/adUv3qYVZ41k1skbBDC4YzeDHVbdD1YcZnXe0agezkk=/dP6RLnvQy2bg9Ykma7wCWhzxQlM-4tXyjZuMEcz4X4Y=?ms=email_20180620)
Thank you,
Jessica

name: Team Kaine
subject: There is still work to be done to protect children and families on the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek -

Since President Trump imposed a "zero tolerance" policy for parents crossing the border, **more than 2,300 kids have been separated from their parents and thrown into sometimes makeshift holding facilities.**

We can't let this cruelty continue.

Despite President Trump's face-saving attempt to "solve" the very crisis he created, there are still so many more questions than answers: when will these kids be reunited with their parents? How can we ensure they are safe? How can we stop this from ever happening again?

We're going to continue to fight for protections for these families, **but in the meantime, there are organizations on the frontlines working tirelessly to support those who are most affected:**

[Will you consider donating to a few organizations doing meaningful work to protect children and families at this very moment?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f138f/3e0906/6bedd030/3e346358/2990706912/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-helpkidsattheborder?refcode=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+consider+donating+to+a+few+orga&utm_campaign=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families&source=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families")

Tim has co-sponsored legislation in the Senate to keep families together - along with all 48 other Democrats - but if you're looking for another way to provide immediate relief for these families, there's even more each of us can do to help.

**We hope you will join us in sending resources and support to these groups doing critical work:**

[Learn more about the organizations on the frontlines right now and consider splitting a donation to them all today >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f138f/3e0906/6bedd030/3e34635f/2990706912/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-helpkidsattheborder?refcode=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Learn+more+about+the+organizations+on+th&utm_campaign=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families&source=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families")

_Tim Kaine for Virginia_

P.S. A note on where your money goes: Your contribution will go directly to the organizations listed on the page. Kaine for Virginia will not receive any portion of your donation - in fact, we won't even know whether or not you gave. **Thank you so much for your generosity in this time of need.**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Support-Children-at-the-Border](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f138f/3e0906/6bedd030/3e34635e/2990706912/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-helpkidsattheborder?refcode=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimkainecomSupportChildrenatt&utm_campaign=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families&source=20180620_1_FR_TEAM_Help-Migrant-Families")
